title: Preparing execution blueprint
description: Turning the approved implementation plan into a coding blueprint
detail: Reusing the implementation plan instead of making another slow planning round-trip.

title: Step 1/3: Establish a compatible Next.js foundation for checkers game i want a really fun and. Create the root layout, global styling primitives, and any package or config updates required for a clean install and production build. Make the app shell responsive and production-ready so later feature work lands on stable scaffolding.
